source_jobs.title: Front End Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HOOK

We’re building the future of customer growth. At Hook, we use AI and Machine Learning to help businesses predict revenue with accuracy, drive customer loyalty, and capture massive value from their existing customers.

We’re a Series A company who ranked 33 out of 100 on the Sifted https://sifted.eu/leaderboards/sifted-100-uk-ireland-2025 fastest growing startups and we have raised $multi-million in funding from some of the top investors in Europe and the US (e.g. Balderton Capital and Lightspeed) and have an enviable list of customers that we’re working with including some of the fastest growing companies in the world. We’re looking for ambitious people that want to be part of our meaningful vision of changing how businesses engage with their customers, and of building one of the world’s leading workplaces for great people along the way.


THE ROLE

We’re looking for a Front End Engineer to help shape the future of Hook’s product experience. You’ll work closely with our design and product teams to turn complex data and workflows into elegant, intuitive user experiences. Using TypeScript and modern front-end frameworks, you’ll build interfaces that are fast, scalable, and loved by our users.

This is a hands-on role where you’ll have real ownership of features from concept to deployment and the freedom to influence our front-end architecture and best practices as we grow.

What You’ll Be Doing

 - Develop high-quality, maintainable front-end features using TypeScript and modern frameworks such as React.

 - Collaborate with product designers to bring polished, user-centric interfaces to life.

 - Translate complex data and insights into clean, intuitive visualisations and dashboards.

 - Optimise components for speed, scalability, and accessibility across browsers and devices.

 - Help define and evolve our front-end architecture and development standards.

 - Work closely with back-end engineers to design APIs and integrate new features.

 - Contribute ideas that influence how Hook’s product looks, feels, and performs.
   


WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - A strong front-end engineer with deep experience in TypeScript, React, and modern web technologies.

 - Someone who cares about creating performant, and accessible interfaces.

 - You enjoy collaborating across teams, from design and product to data and engineering.

 - You thrive in a fast-paced environment and are comfortable taking initiative and ownership.

 - You have an eye for detail, but also know when to ship and iterate.

 - You’re curious about AI and data-driven products, and excited to build tools that help businesses grow.
   



💸 Up to £105,000 (depending on experience)





BENEFITS

🏖️ 27 days holiday (option to buy and sell holiday) + bank holidays

📈 Generous stock options

🏥 Private health insurance so you can get the best care you need

🧘 Flexible monthly wellness allowance that you can use monthly on things like gyms, yoga, mental health & healthy food

📚 Annual learning & development budget for every employee

🏢 Flexible working - we’ll all come together three days a week but otherwise you can work from home or come into our awesome office in Liverpool Street

💻 The best equipment for everyone to work with

Our founder and team are incredibly passionate about creating a company culture that is diverse, inclusive, productive and enjoyable for all our colleagues. As part of a growing start-up team, we expect a lot from you and will work hard to make sure you have everything you need to be at your best.

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HOOK

We’re building the future of customer growth. At Hook, we use AI and Machine Learning to help businesses predict revenue with accuracy, drive customer loyalty, and capture massive value from their existing customers.

We’re a Series A company who ranked 33 out of 100 on the Sifted https://sifted.eu/leaderboards/sifted-100-uk-ireland-2025 fastest growing startups and we have raised $multi-million in funding from some of the top investors in Europe and the US (e.g. Balderton Capital and Lightspeed) and have an enviable list of customers that we’re working with including some of the fastest growing companies in the world. We’re looking for ambitious people that want to be part of our meaningful vision of changing how businesses engage with their customers, and of building one of the world’s leading workplaces for great people along the way.

Find out more about what it's like to be part of the Sales team at Hook here 👉🏼https://workinsales.hook.co/




WE’RE LOOKING FOR PEOPLE WHO ARE EITHER:

 - Just starting out and serious about building a career in sales.

 - Or coming from a different field and making a deliberate move into sales.

We're looking for smart, driven, resilient people who are motivated to earn and grow fast. As an SDR at Hook, you’ll be the first point of contact for new prospects. Your outreach sets the tone for everything that comes after. You’ll learn how to build pipeline, have real business conversations, and become the kind of salesperson companies fight to hire.




🔨 WHAT YOU’LL ACTUALLY DO

🎯 Own outbound outreach: Cold calls, emails, and LinkedIn's to spark conversations with ideal prospects.

🧠 Learn what makes buyers tick: Ask smart questions and understand their goals, pains, and priorities.

🧩 Qualify leads + book meetings: You’ll tee up high quality opportunities for our Account Executives.

📊 Track and improve performance: Hit targets, test tactics, and help us fine tune what great looks like.

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Be the voice of the customer: Share insights with marketing, product, and leadership to keep us customer obsessed.

🎤 Represent Hook IRL: Join us at events, conferences, and anywhere our buyers are hanging out.

📚 Level up fast: Access top-tier sales training, 1:1 coaching, and hands-on mentorship from people who’ve done it before.




🙌 WHAT MAKES YOU A GREAT FIT

 - You’re driven to build a career in sales: Whether you're just starting out or transitioning from another field, you're serious about developing your sales skills and growing within the company.

 - You’ve got grit: You bounce back quickly from setbacks and keep pushing forward.

 - You’re curious and hungry to learn: You want to understand not just what a customer wants, but why they want it.

 - You communicate like a pro: You’re clear, confident, and friendly, able to connect with people quickly.

 - You’re a team player: You’re not just focused on your numbers, you want to help the whole team succeed.

 - You’re ready to grow fast: You’re motivated to take on real responsibility and want to learn from the best in the business.

Salary: £35,000 + £15,000 OTE (uncapped commission) & equity


BENEFITS

🏖️ 27 days holiday (option to buy and sell holiday) + bank holidays

📈 Generous stock options

🏥 Private health insurance so you can get the best care you need

🧘 Flexible monthly wellness allowance that you can use monthly on things like gyms, yoga, mental health & healthy food

📚 Annual learning & development budget for every employee

🏢 Flexible working - we’ll all come together three days a week but otherwise you can work from home or come into our awesome office in Liverpool Street

💻 The best equipment for everyone to work with

Our founder and team are incredibly passionate about creating a company culture that is diverse, inclusive, productive and enjoyable for all our colleagues. As part of a growing start-up team, we expect a lot from you and will work hard to make sure you have everything you need to be at your best.

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HOOK

We’re building the future of customer growth. At Hook, we use AI and Machine Learning to help businesses predict revenue with accuracy, drive customer loyalty, and capture massive value from their existing customers.

We’re a Series A company who ranked 33 out of 100 on the Sifted https://sifted.eu/leaderboards/sifted-100-uk-ireland-2025 fastest growing startups and we have raised $multi-million in funding from some of the top investors in Europe and the US (e.g. Balderton Capital and Lightspeed) and have an enviable list of customers that we’re working with including some of the fastest growing companies in the world. We’re looking for ambitious people that want to be part of our meaningful vision of changing how businesses engage with their customers, and of building one of the world’s leading workplaces for great people along the way.


WHAT YOU WILL DO

Joining Hook at this early stage as we scale provides the unique opportunity for someone to have an immediate impact on our revenue and customer growth for 2025 and beyond. We are looking for someone to manage the entire sales cycle, from identifying opportunities, you'll strategise prospecting efforts, uncover key insights in discovery sessions, accurately predict outcomes, and close deals.

 - Work closely with our SDR team to fuel our growth by stacking up your pipeline! Your self-motivation and tenacity will fuel the generation of new leads, ensuring our success soars to new heights

 - Prioritise your book of business and formulate account plans and strategies to ensure success

 - Embrace the role of a trusted advisor by understanding our customers' needs to scope out how Hook would be used within the prospect’s company e.g. implementation process and timeframes, workflows, metrics & goals that they can expect to achieve etc.

 - Contributing to the growth and development of the Hook product by providing feedback from conversations with your customers and prospects

Who we are looking for?

 - Proven track record of successfully selling SaaS solutions in a B2B environment - ideally you have consistently over achieved on your targets of been a top performer

 - You thrive in ambiguity and can identify your prospects’ pain points and run captivating product demos that highlight the differentiation & value in Hook

 - You are an excellent communicator and feel comfortable authentically engaging with C-Suite level decision makers.

 - You are naturally curious and an attentive listener. Your negotiation style is based on immersing yourself in the challenges of your prospects and deriving enjoyment from solving their problems

 - Desirable: Experience with ACV's >$100k

 - You have the ability to take a strategic and structured approach to identifying new business opportunities, engaging internal and client stakeholders, and closing deals

 - Embrace team culture and uphold our company values

💸 £75,000 - £90,000 base salary plus double OTE (depending on experience)




BENEFITS

🏖️ 27 days holiday (option to buy and sell holiday) + bank holidays

📈 Generous stock options

🏥 Private health insurance so you can get the best care you need

🧘 Flexible monthly wellness allowance that you can use monthly on things like gyms, yoga, mental health & healthy food

📚 Annual learning & development budget for every employee

🏢 Flexible working - we’ll all come together three days a week but otherwise you can work from home or come into our awesome office in Liverpool Street

💻 The best equipment for everyone to work with

Our founder and team are incredibly passionate about creating a company culture that is diverse, inclusive, productive and enjoyable for all our colleagues. As part of a growing start-up team, we expect a lot from you and will work hard to make sure you have everything you need to be at your best.

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative Team Lead
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HOOK

We’re building the future of customer growth. At Hook, we use AI and Machine Learning to help businesses predict revenue with accuracy, drive customer loyalty, and capture massive value from their existing customers.

We’re a Series A company who ranked 33 out of 100 on the Sifted https://sifted.eu/leaderboards/sifted-100-uk-ireland-2025 fastest growing startups and we have raised $multi-million in funding from some of the top investors in Europe and the US (e.g. Balderton Capital and Lightspeed) and have an enviable list of customers that we’re working with including some of the fastest growing companies in the world. We’re looking for ambitious people that want to be part of our meaningful vision of changing how businesses engage with their customers, and of building one of the world’s leading workplaces for great people along the way.


SDR TEAM LEAD

As SDR Team Lead, you’ll lead a pod of SDRs day to day, helping them build confidence, sharpen their outbound skills, and consistently improve performance. Reporting into the SDR Manager, you’ll play a key role in creating a high-energy, high-accountability culture while remaining close to the craft yourself.

This is a great opportunity for either:

 - a top-performing SDR ready to take their first step into leadership, or

 - someone with early leadership experience who still loves outbound sales and coaching.

We’re much more interested in attitude, coachability, and leadership potential than years of management experience.




WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING




COACHING & TEAM DEVELOPMENT

 - Support and coach a pod of SDRs in their day-to-day performance

 - Run regular 1:1s, call reviews, and role-play sessions

 - Help reps improve cold calling, messaging, objection handling, and qualification

 - Lead by example with strong outbound execution and best practices

 - Create a positive, high-performance team culture built around continuous improvement


PERFORMANCE & EXECUTION

 - Help the team hit and exceed outbound activity and pipeline goals

 - Spot performance gaps early and support reps with clear coaching plans

 - Maintain high standards across prospecting quality and qualification

 - Use frameworks like MEDDPICC to improve discovery and qualification consistency


PROCESS & SCALE

 - Partner with the SDR Manager on onboarding and ramping new hires

 - Share frontline feedback to improve messaging, tooling, and outbound processes

 - Contribute ideas that help us scale the SDR function as we grow




WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 1–2+ years experience in an SDR/BDR or outbound sales role

 - A consistent track record of strong performance

 - Someone who enjoys helping others improve and succeed

 - Strong communication skills and confidence giving feedback

 - Highly coachable, driven, and eager to grow into leadership

 - Comfortable leading by example and setting a high standard for execution

 - Organised, proactive, and able to balance personal performance with team support

Previous people management experience is not required — we’re open to candidates taking their first step into leadership.




WHY THIS ROLE?

 - Opportunity to step into leadership early in your career

 - High ownership and visibility within a fast-growing team

 - Strong mentorship from experienced sales leadership

 - Chance to shape culture, process, and team standards as we scale

💸 Salary - £50,000-£55,000 base + £25,000 - £30,000 (depending on experience)


BENEFITS

🏖️ 27 days holiday (option to buy and sell holiday) + bank holidays

📈 Generous stock options

🏥 Private health insurance so you can get the best care you need

🧘 Flexible monthly wellness allowance that you can use monthly on things like gyms, yoga, mental health & healthy food

📚 Annual learning & development budget for every employee

🏢 Flexible working - we’ll all come together three days a week but otherwise you can work from home or come into our awesome office in Liverpool Street

💻 The best equipment for everyo

source_jobs.title: Backend / Fullstack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HOOK

We’re building the future of customer growth. At Hook, we use AI and Machine Learning to help businesses predict revenue with accuracy, drive customer loyalty, and capture massive value from their existing customers.

We’re a Series A company who ranked 33 out of 100 on the Sifted https://sifted.eu/leaderboards/sifted-100-uk-ireland-2025 fastest growing startups and we have raised $multi-million in funding from some of the top investors in Europe and the US (e.g. Balderton Capital and Lightspeed) and have an enviable list of customers that we’re working with including some of the fastest growing companies in the world. We’re looking for ambitious people that want to be part of our meaningful vision of changing how businesses engage with their customers, and of building one of the world’s leading workplaces for great people along the way.

Responsibilities:

You will wear many hats in your engineering duties. Your day-to-day will include:

 - Working in a team with technical and non-technical colleagues to design and build product features that add value to our customers

 - Working across the stack (back-end focus) and writing clean, well-tested code

 - Own significant parts of our product architecture and propose and lead new improvements

 - Reviewing other software engineers code and provide structured feedback

 - Designing our engineering processes and patterns to be the best for our team

 - Monitoring system performance and ensure everything is up and running

 - Designing our data schemas to suit the needs across the business

There’s a lot going on - you’ll be building a brand new category of SaaS product! The more you want to be involved, the more you will find there is to do and the more impact you will have on our joint success.

Requirements:

We're looking for an ambitious self-starter who wants to be part of an early-stage company full of amazing talent and with a global vision.

 - Experience working on both frontend and backend development. We use React on the frontend side and Python on the back end

 - Experience working in taking products through different development environments into Production

 - Excellent communication skills, with the ability to effectively collaborate and convey ideas to diverse stakeholders

 - The ability to pick up and use third party APIs and tools

 - Experience working with Python on the backend with frameworks, such as Django, Flask or FastAPI

 - Desirable: A good understanding of cloud technologies

Salary - £70,000-£85,000 (depending on experience)


BENEFITS

🏖️ 27 days holiday (option to buy and sell holiday) + bank holidays

📈 Generous stock options

🏥 Private health insurance so you can get the best care you need

🧘 Flexible monthly wellness allowance that you can use monthly on things like gyms, yoga, mental health & healthy food

📚 Annual learning & development budget for every employee

🏢 Flexible working - we’ll all come together three days a week but otherwise you can work from home or come into our awesome office in Liverpool Street

💻 The best equipment for everyone to work with

Our founder and team are incredibly passionate about creating a company culture that is diverse, inclusive, productive and enjoyable for all our colleagues. As part of a growing start-up team, we expect a lot from you and will work hard to make sure you have everything you need to be at your best.

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT HOOK

We’re building the future of customer growth. At Hook, we use AI and Machine Learning to help businesses predict revenue with accuracy, drive customer loyalty, and capture massive value from their existing customers.

We’re a Series A company who ranked 33 out of 100 on the Sifted https://sifted.eu/leaderboards/sifted-100-uk-ireland-2025 fastest growing startups and we have raised $multi-million in funding from some of the top investors in Europe and the US (e.g. Balderton Capital and Lightspeed) and have an enviable list of customers that we’re working with including some of the fastest growing companies in the world. We’re looking for ambitious people that want to be part of our meaningful vision of changing how businesses engage with their customers, and of building one of the world’s leading workplaces for great people along the way.

The Role:

We’re looking for a commercially driven Customer Success Manager / Account Manager to own and grow revenue across Hook’s enterprise customer base. This is a revenue-owning role, responsible for retention, expansion, and renewals across strategic accounts.

You’ll operate as the commercial owner of your accounts, combining strategic relationship management, product expertise, and commercial negotiation to drive long-term revenue growth.

Many of our customers are Customer Success teams themselves, so you’ll be working with highly sophisticated buyers. That means you’ll need strong commercial instincts, credibility with senior stakeholders, and the ability to translate product value into measurable business outcomes.

In this role, you’ll own the customer lifecycle end-to-end: from initial strategy sessions to adoption, value realisation, and renewals. You’ll be responsible for ensuring our customers achieve measurable success with Hook, while also shaping how we define and deliver customer success as a discipline.



What you’ll be doing

 - Own commercial performance across your accounts, including renewals, expansion pipeline, and revenue growth.

 - Identify and close expansion opportunities through strategic account planning and stakeholder engagement, Project managing success plans & running strategic reviews

 - Act as a product and technical expert: quickly develop deep knowledge of Hook’s platform, and coach customers on best practices for adoption and integration.

 - Partner with customer success leaders (your peers!): build credibility with CSMs, revenue leaders, and executives to help them achieve value from Hook.

 - Build relationships with economic buyers and executive stakeholders to drive long-term account growth.

 - Collaborate internally: work with Product, Engineering and Sales to ensure deliverables are met and feedback is actioned.

 - Contribute to the future of Customer Growth at Hook: continuously iterate on our processes and approach, helping us set the benchmark for customer success excellence at scale.

Who are we looking for?

 - Experience in a commercial Customer Success or Account Management role in SaaS, with responsibility for renewals, expansion, and revenue growth across an enterprise portfolio of accounts.

 - Strong technical aptitude: comfortable learning complex software quickly, understanding integrations, and explaining technical concepts in simple terms.

 - Proven track record of hitting commercial targets, including managing renewals, identifying expansion opportunities, and closing upsells or cross-sells.

 - Exceptional communication skills, with confidence presenting to both large audiences and senior stakeholders.

 - Experience building outcome-driven customer success plans and managing multiple workstreams simultaneously.

 - Organised and proactive: able to prioritise accounts effectively while also thriving in a fast-moving environment with evolving playbooks.

Salary - £100,000- £120,000 OTE (depending on experience)


BENEFITS

🏖️ 27 days holiday (option to buy and sell holiday) + bank holidays

📈 Generous stock opt

notes: Series A startup with AI/ML focus, mixed tech and sales roles
